data.title: Two-Step Verification
data.description: Provides an additional layer of security by requiring a second form of authentication.

data.title: Encryption at Rest
data.description: Data stored on the servers is encrypted to prevent unauthorized access.

data.title: Challenge-Response Authentication
data.description: Prevents unauthorized device registration by requiring a server-issued token.

data.title: Spam and Abuse Detection
data.description: Systems in place to prevent spam and abusive activity on the platform.

data.title: Security Patching and Updates
data.description: Regular updates to address vulnerabilities and enhance security features.
data.technical_spec: Automated security patch management, CVE monitoring
